ogTitle: Cosmo Newbery vs Cossack: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cosmo Newbery and Cossack.
heading: Cosmo Newbery vs Cossack — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cosmo Newbery, Western Australia and Cossack, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cosmo Newbery has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Cossack (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cosmo Newbery or Cossack safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cosmo Newbery has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Cossack scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cosmo Newbery scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Cossack scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cosmo Newbery or Cossack?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cosmo Newbery has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
